seo.title: 어린이와 청소년을 위한 IT 교육 | Codeverta
seo.description: 프로젝트 기반 학습으로 배우는 어린이와 청소년 대상 코딩, AI, Roblox, 모바일 앱, 웹사이트, 2D/3D 디자인 수업입니다.
seo.keywords: 어린이 IT 교육, 청소년 코딩 수업, AI 수업, Roblox 코딩

description.before: An international curriculum designed to build creativity through

form.title: Join Now

validation.name: Name must be at least 3 characters

form.success: Registration sent. We will contact you via WhatsApp.

children.title: Children Class
children.description: We equip young learners with the language of the future. Through an interactive programming curriculum, students learn coding while naturally building logic and problem-solving skills. With expert mentors and hands-on learning, every session becomes an exciting learning adventure.
children.growthDescription: Because the best investment is education that stays relevant with the times.

teen.title: Teen Class
teen.description: Designed for ages 8 to 16, this program turns imagination into real applications. Students explore visual coding and gradually move into pure syntax such as Python and JavaScript. Project-based learning ensures every student finishes with digital work they can proudly showcase.
teen.growthDescription: We are committed to delivering education quality that matches their potential.

curriculum.eyebrow: We believe your child deserves the best education.
curriculum.title: Programs Offered

roblox-2d.title: 2D Games Development with Roblox
roblox-2d.description: Students learn to create and program simple animations and games through tasks and projects.

mobile-apps.title: Mobile Apps Development
mobile-apps.description: Students learn the fundamentals of building simple mobile apps and interactive digital products.
outcomes: Develop block coding and design skills

roblox-1.title: Roblox I
roblox-1.description: Students learn the Lua programming language and create their own games in Roblox Studio.
outcomes: Build interactive Roblox games such as collecting games, Obby games, and teleporters

roblox-2.title: Roblox II
roblox-2.description: Students continue coding with Lua and focus more deeply on 3D design for professional game projects.
outcomes: Improve textual coding and design skills

website-dev.title: Website Development
website-dev.description: Students learn to build web pages, code website layouts, and understand how websites work.
outcomes: Learn HTML, CSS, and PHP syntax
Create static websites with database concepts
Develop basic textual coding and design skills

2d-3d-design.title: 2D & 3D Design
2d-3d-design.description: Students learn 2D and 3D design while understanding how design and programming connect.
